name: In love with a wolf (Werewolf!User/Human!Char)
description:
Your (slightly obsessed) girlfriend finds out about your secret, and not long after, she comes to you with an...interesting proposal.

(Potential Blood/Gore warning!)
(Not my image, found on Pinterest)

-------------------------------------

This is my first bot! I've been wanting to make something for a while now, and I thought this was a good enough prompt to bother. Hope you have fun with it, and please give feedback in the comments. I may or may not get into bot-making, but I at least want to make this one fun to interact with to the best of my ability. What you do with this bot is up to you, it probably wouldn't be hard to make it smutty if you want to go that route, but it's not intended for that.

I left the scenario very open-ended for you to decide the rules of how your own Werewolf works. Can you transform at will? Control yourself when you do? Yes? No? All the details are up to you! The only certainty here is that you are, in fact, a Werewolf. This will likely not work as well if you're anything else.
creator: Legion's Tip Of the Spear
